ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-30-2017 Continued To Jun-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Lew, for and with petitioner Raymond Wong; Mabel Wong

Mr. Lew stated that no objection had been filed to the relief requested in the petition, and that he was unaware of any opposition. The Court stated that he was prepared to grant the petition and sign the order. Mr. Lew reported that beneficiary Mabel Wong wished to have the order modified to eliminate the middle names of the beneficiaries and insert just their initials, as the names as listed were different than what was actually in use. The Court responded that he could not just modify the order, but that either an amended or supplemental petition would need to be filed showing cause to make the change. After conferring with Ms. Wong, Mr. Lew stated that he would be filing either an amended or supplemental petition and submitting a revised order. The matter was continued to June 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
